nasb.text: For thus says the Lord God of Israel, ‘The bowl of flour shall not be exhausted, nor shall the jar of oil be empty, until the day that the Lord sends rain on the face of the earth.’ ”

esv.text: For thus says the Lord, the God of Israel, ‘The jar of flour shall not be spent, and the jug of oil shall not be empty, until the day that the Lord sends rain upon the earth.’”

cnv.text: 因為耶和華以色列的　神這樣說：‘缸裡的麵粉必不會用完，瓶裡的油決不會短缺，直等到耶和華降雨在地面上的日子。’”

ccb.text: 因为以色列的上帝耶和华说，‘在耶和华降雨之前，你坛里的面和瓶里的油必不会空。’”
